case_title: JOSE MARTINEZ VS. NOR-CAL JANITORIAL SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-03-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOSE MARTINEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 12/13/16 IS INVALID. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 8/31/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
